abilities.name: Hunting Dogs
abilities.description: Enemy characters receive -1 Df while within a1 of this character.

abilities.name: Unimpeded
abilities.description: This character ignores penalties for terrain while taking Movement Actions.

actions: (1) Snapping Jaws (Pugilism) | AV: 4 (8) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/3/4 damage. This attack gains +2 AV when taken as part of a disengaging strike.
system.notes: Guard dogs were among the first animals brought to Malifaux by the Guild, valued for their ability to detect Neverborn by scent and serve as cheap sentries.
